LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. A R G U E D AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- CAUSE OF ACTION 1 - OVERRULED CAUSE OF ACTION 2 - OVERRULED. THE COURT FINDS CAUSE OF ACTION 2 IS NOT BARRED BY THE UNFAIR INSURANCE PRACTICES ACT BUT TREATS THE PRAYER OF THE COMPLAINT AT PAGE 7, LINES 21 AND 22 AS A MOTION TO STRIKE AND STRIKE PRAYER FOR PUNITVE AND EXEMPLARY DAMAGES FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH NOTICE REQUIREMENTS OF CIVIL CODE ?1782(A). ALSO, THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HONORABLE JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR 4761 (GPS)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: A P P E A R A N C E S:
Karen M. Burton, Esq. of KRIEG KELLER SLOAN 249-8330 for defendant WEST COAST LIFE INSURANCE CO. demurring party
Ivo Labar, Esq. of KERR & WAGSTAFFE 371-8500 for Plaintiff ALICE FORESTIERE opposing party
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Cause of Action 1 - overruled
Cause of Action 2 - overruled. The Court finds Cause of Action 2 is not barred by the Unfair Insurance Practices Act but treats the Prayer of the Complaint at Page 7, lines 21 and 22 as a motion to strike and strike prayer for punitve and exemplary damages for failure to comply with notice requirements of Civil Code ?1782(a). Also, the motion to strike is granted without leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
(JJM/rc) Susan Crozier, CSR 4761
